name: April Tribute
acquisitionSource: Clear Interlude - Verboten Covenant: Prime Fissure

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At turn start, if the enemies' total HP is above 75%, the wielder's Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG increase by 35%.

lore: Laid to rest in the spring of 18@2; the headstones stand as a chorus of silent hymns.
